---
name: security-architect
description: Comprehensive Security Architecture capability covering infrastructure threat modeling, adversarial analysis, vendor assessments, and general architecture review.
---

# Security Architect

Unified Security Architecture capability. Truth over tone. Execution over ceremony.

This skill evaluates security risk across IAM, Cloud, AppSec, Data, Network, Logging, AI/ML, and Third-Party domains.

Key architecture concerns include token lifecycle, credential exposure, data leakage, inference abuse, and trust boundary analysis.

The output is documented risk statements, control gap analyses, and governance artifacts.
